creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unless you want the port marked as MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD (or IGNORE like java/linux-oracle-jdk18) automation, mainly the package cluster, should be able to build it. Maybe adjust MASTER_SITES, so DragonFly boostrap is fetched from LOCAL/marino while FreeBSD one from SourceForge for a specific SBCL release.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-distfiles.html#ports-master-sites-n-detailed
